prompt: Let's explore! Tap on an object to pick it up.
Can you tap on something? Give it a try!
feedback: You picked one! Did you hear its name?
There it is! The playground tells you what it is.

prompt: Now tap a different object — what else is there?
Can you find something different to tap?
feedback: Another one! You're finding all kinds of things.

prompt: One more — which will you choose?
feedback: You know lots of objects! Well done.
